title: Ryno Tools Exam Definitions
description: Contract for src/datasets/exam.json — timed-exam specs per category/subcategory.
$comment: JSON Schema cannot express the cross-file coupling that examManager.buildExamQuestions relies on. The validator additionally enforces, per subcategory: (1) every `distribution` key matches a `topic_label` value present in that subcategory's dataset; (2) sum(distribution values) == totalQuestions; (3) passingScore <= totalQuestions; (4) each topic_label pool holds at least its distribution count.
